meta.title: render-doc Self-Test Guide
meta.subtitle: Proves HTML and PDF render from a synthetic doc-model.
meta.author: Will Vessels
learning_objectives: Confirm prose, callout, list, and screenshot blocks render.
Confirm the **crop** box is applied to a screenshot.

blocks.md: This is a *synthetic* guide. It uses **inline markdown**, a `code span`, and a [link](https://example.com).
Callouts render with a colored rail and a label.
The frame below is cropped to drop the webcam strip on the right (kept box = left 78%).

blocks.caption: Cropped: webcam strip removed.
blocks.crop_reason: Removed the webcam strip on the right; content kept whole.

blocks.caption: This frame is missing on purpose.

blocks.md: The missing frame above must render a placeholder, not crash.
If you can read this, sections rendered in order.
Unknown block type degrades to prose.

footer.disclaimer: Synthetic self-test output. Not a real guide.
